GB 17896一2022
Minimum allowable values of energy
efficiency and energy efficiency grades
of ballasts for gas discharge lamps for
general lighting
1 Scope
This document specifies the energy efficiency grades, minimum allowable values of energy efficien-
cy, and test methods of ballasts for tubular fluorescent lamps，single-capped fluorescent induction
lamps，metal-halide lamps and high-pressure sodium lamps.
This document is applicable to electromagnetic and electronic ballasts for tubular fluorescent lamps
with nominal wattage of 4 W-120 W (inclusive) ,electronic ballasts for single-capped fluorescent in-
duction lamps (externally coupled) with rated wattage of 30 W-400 W (inclusive) ，electromagnetic
and electronic ballasts for metal-halide lamps with nominal wattage of 20 W-1 500 W (inclusive) and
electromagnetic ballasts for high-pressure sodium lamps with nominal wattage of 70 W-1 000 W (in-
clusive),，all with rated voltage of AC 220V,， rated frequency of 50 Hz.
This document is not applicable to electronic ballasts for tubular fluorescent lamps having non-pre-
heated cathodes, and ballasts as part of an integrated lamp and cannot be dismantled.
2 Normative references
The contents in the following documents constitute the essential clauses of this document through
normative references in the text. For dated references，only the edition cited applies. For undated
references，the latest edition of the referenced document (including any amendments) applies.
GB/T 32483. 1， Energy performance of lamp controlgear一Part 1: Controlgear for fluorescent
lamps一Method of measurement to determine the total input power of controlgear circuits and the
efficiency of the controlgear
GB/T 32483.2, Energy performance of /lamp controlgear一Part 2: Controlgear for high intensity dis-
charge Iamps (excluding fluorescent Iamps )一Method of measurement to determine the efficiency
of controlgear
GB/T 34841, Fluorescent induction lamps一Performance specification

1
